title: cephaelis alba
intro: Cephaelis alba, also known as White Ipecac, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract. The medicinal properties of Cephaelis alba include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Cephaelis alba can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or syrup, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote respiratory health and alleviate congestion.
